docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [KATHERINE BROCKMAN (REPRESENTATIVE) APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT (AIRBNB INC.)] FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TESHAWN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TESHAWN JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT HOWEVER CALLED THE COURT WITH A MEDICAL EMERGENCY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB INC REPRESENTED BY KATHREINE BROCKMAN. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN ALLOWS FOR PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTED 90 DAY CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S FILING WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXBIHITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, TESHAWN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TESHAWN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING OF JULY 31, 2023 CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM]

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF TESHAWN JOHNSON IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY KATHRINE BROCKMAN, LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS. HONORABLE JAMES CHANG ALLOWS THE ZOOM APPEARANCE WITH NO OBJECTIONS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
